name: Candy Lasses/1953 Pillsbury Bakeoff
recipeInstructions:
A senior division winner in the 1953 Pillsbury Bakeoff.
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt and spices; set aside.
2. Cream together shortening, sugar and brown sugar. Add slightly beaten egg and molasses; beat well.
3. Add crushed peppermint candy (about 2 ounces) along with the flour mixture.
4. Drop by teaspoonsful onto greased baking sheet.
5. Bake in preheated 350°F oven for 12-15 minutes.
6. Cool on wire rack to cool completely for 5 minutes.
